info.english_meaning: to contract to reduce to constrict
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: nopaDaH  kftaparasavarRanirdeSaH  ' taYjU ' iti kzIrasvAmisammataH pAWaH  jakArAntamaDye pAWAt evameva nyAyyam iti tadASayaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'daDnA paya Atanakti' payasi daDyAsicya tat saMhataM karotItyarTaH
'indrasya tvA BAgaM somenAtanacmi' (vA0 saM0 14) somAsecanena sAndraM karomItyAha
'tadezeva vratacaryA yatpUrvedyurdugDaM daDi havirAtaYcanaM tat kurvanti' (Sa0 brA0 11141) havirAtaYcanaM havizaH sAndrIkaraRam
'yo daDiDAnyAmaprayataM paya AtaYcya manTati' (Apa0 Da0 12914) takrAdyAtaYcanena saMskftyetyarTaH
'somena tvA''tanacmi' (tE0 saM0 113) Atanacmi GanIkaromi tvA kzIram
'prAtardugDaM dvEDaM kftvA tasyAnyatarAM BaktimAtacya tena' yajeta (E0 brA0 73) ukto'rTaH AtaYcanaM dravyAntarasamprayogeRa GanIkaraRam
